name: Exelon
analysis: EXC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 6% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at $47.2358. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $47.2300, stop $44.6094, target $55.0918 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
